title: PacketEnvelope
description: Immutable message envelope wrapping every engine action. Source: engine/packet/packet_envelope.py:PacketEnvelope. CONTRACT-06: every packet persisted. CONTRACT-07: immutability. CONTRACT-08: content_hash = SHA-256.

packet_id.description: UUID v4 unique packet identifier. Source: engine/packet/packet_envelope.py:uuid.uuid4()

tenant.description: Tenant/domain ID. Enforces tenant isolation. Source: engine/handlers.py:init_dependencies()

payload.description: Action-specific payload. Opaque at envelope level.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of canonical payload. CONTRACT-08: immutability verification.

trace_id.description: Caller or chassis-generated trace ID. Propagated through full lifecycle.

parent_id.description: For RESPONSE packets: packet_id of the originating REQUEST.
